arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Can Arne Slot win Premier League title race without signings in the January window?
arts.sum: Liverpool are happy to not spend anything in the January transfer window as they arguably have the best squad in Europe and are set to compete on multiple fronts.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW24 predictions: Arsenal to win five-goal thriller, Liverpool to send out title message
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on Glenn Smyth - a member of rock'n'roll blast band Solar Eyes - for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 24 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 24 Scout Picks: Liverpool triple-up
arts.sum: Our final selection of the best players for the upcoming Gameweek The post FPL Gameweek 24 Scout Picks: Liverpool triple-up appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool star looks unrecognisable just THREE years after retiring as he takes up new role
arts.sum: The 39-year-old has been appointed the Toffees' new set piece coach, while Alan Irvine has reunited with the former Manchester United boss for his third stint as Moyes' assistant manager.

arts.ttl: Jordan Henderson now expected to STAY at Ajax until the end of season - as ill-feeling towards former Liverpool captain reaches peak in Netherlands
arts.sum: Jordan Henderson is expected to stay at Ajax until the end of the season, unless Monaco come back with an extraordinary bid for the midfielder this month.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Bournemouth - Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool's predicted XI for their Premier League clash with Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals Mohamed Salah talks as Liverpool hope for contract agreement
arts.sum: Reds forward continually linked with money-spinning move to Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster emerges as late-window transfer target for Bournemouth
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has made his way onto the transfer radar of Bournemouth. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards Pablo…

arts.ttl: Premier League announcement could see Arsenal and Liverpool's roles reversed in title race
arts.sum: Arsenal are 2-0 down to Newcastle ahead of the the Carabao Cup semi-final second leg - and should they go out and Liverpool make the final, it will be the Gunners who have a game in hand over the Reds

arts.ttl: Sinisterra back in training - but will be assessed before Liverpool visit
arts.sum: LUIS Sinisterra has returned to the Cherries squad in training – but he will face an assessment today to see if he will be involved in the squad to face Liverpool.
